name: Delayed Blast Fireball

components.materialDescription: a ball of bat guano and sulfur

effects.description: When the spell ends or the bead is triggered, it explodes. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere makes a Dexterity save, taking the accumulated Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a success.
The spell creates a glowing bead at a chosen point. Its damage accumulates while concentration continues, and touching, throwing, collision, or spell end can trigger the explosion.

scaling.customFormula: +1d6 whenever the caster's turn ends and the spell has not ended

grantedActions.notes: A creature that succeeds on the Dexterity save after touching the bead can throw it up to 40 feet.

controlOptions.name: Glowing Bead
controlOptions.effect: The spell condenses as a glowing bead at a chosen point until it explodes.

controlOptions.name: Damage Accumulates
controlOptions.effect: The base damage is 12d6 and increases by 1d6 whenever the caster's turn ends and the spell has not ended.

controlOptions.name: Touch Bead Save
controlOptions.effect: A creature that touches the bead before the spell ends makes a Dexterity save; on a failed save, the spell ends and the bead explodes.

controlOptions.name: Throw Bead
controlOptions.effect: On a successful save after touching the bead, the creature can throw the bead up to 40 feet.

controlOptions.name: Collision Explodes
controlOptions.effect: If the thrown bead enters a creature's space or collides with a solid object, the spell ends and the bead explodes.

controlOptions.name: Ignites Flammable Objects
controlOptions.effect: When the bead explodes, flammable objects in the explosion that are not being worn or carried start burning.

description: A beam of yellow light flashes from you, then condenses at a chosen point within range as a glowing bead for the duration. When the spell ends, the bead explodes, and each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point makes a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes Fire damage equal to the total accumulated damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The spell's base damage is 12d6, and the damage increases by 1d6 whenever your turn ends and the spell hasn't ended. If a creature touches the glowing bead before the spell ends, that creature makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the spell ends, causing the bead to explode. On a successful save, the creature can throw the bead up to 40 feet. If the thrown bead enters a creature's space or collides with a solid object, the spell ends, and the bead explodes. When the bead explodes, flammable objects in the explosion that aren't being worn or carried start burning .
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The base damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 7.
